title: ticket_paths should be project-root-relative
description: Current ticket_paths use paths relative to the milestones file location (e.g., 'tickets/T1.1.json'). This creates ambiguity when milestones move between directories. Paths should be relative to the project root (e.g., 'project-management/data/tickets/T1.1.json') for unambiguous resolution.

questions.question: Should paths be relative to project root or absolute?

operator_response.rationale: Portable across environments and clone locations
